title: CleanSpark (CLSK) Analyst Ratings and Price Target Summary
text: According to 12 analysts, CleanSpark (CLSK) has a Strong Buy consensus rating as of April 20, 2026. The stock rating distribution is 97.22% BUY and 2.78% HOLD. Cleanspark's 12-month average price target is $19.27. The high is $27 issued by HC Wainwright & Co. on November 26, 2025. The low is $14 issued by Cantor Fitzgerald on April 9, 2026. The last downgrade for Cleanspark Inc happened on September 26, 2025 when JP Morgan changed their price target from $15 to $14. Additionally, there have been recent price target reductions from several firms, including CleanSpark price target lowered to $19 from $22 at B. Riley. Cleanspark has 109.23% upside potential, based on the analysts' average price target. The consensus shows very bullish sentiment from analysts, though there have been some recent price target reductions from major investment firms.
